name: Number F0: Utopic Draco Future
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＦＮｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>フューチャーナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>０ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>未</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>み</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>来</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>皇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ホープ
name_jp_tl: Future Numbers 0: Future Dragon King, Hope
desc:
3 Xyz Monsters with the same Rank, except "Number" monsters
(This card's original Rank is always treated as 1. This card is always treated as a "Utopic Future" card.)
You can also Xyz Summon this card by using "Number F0: Utopic Future" you control as material. (Transfer its materials to this card.) Cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects. Once per turn, when your opponent activates a monster effect (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 material from this card; negate the activation, then, if that monster is on the field, gain control of it.

action: Takes control of an opponent's monster
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
Negates the activation of Effect Monster's effect
summoning: Requires Xyz Monsters as Xyz Materials
Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
